summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Design Overhaul. All 14 features tested successfully. The design changes include: glassmorphic login page with nature background, floating pill bottom navigation with active dot indicator, underline-style lesson tabs (NOW/NEXT/AFTER), iMessage-like chat bubbles with distinct own/other colors, pill-shaped chat input with circular send button, and refined global styling.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before establishment (falls back to REST polling correctly)

passed_tests: Login page renders with glassmorphic card over nature forest background image
Login page has email input, password input, Sign In button with arrow icon
Login page has forgot password link and register link
Login flow works correctly - admin can login and is redirected to dashboard
Dashboard loads with welcome greeting (GOOD EVENING + user first name)
Dashboard shows lesson hero card with title, description, date, progress bar, Continue button
Dashboard shows stats grid (Day Streak, Lessons Done, Enrolled)
Dashboard shows Quick Actions (Courses, Chat, Progress)
Bottom navigation is a floating pill with blur effect (bottom-nav-float class)
Bottom nav has 5 items: Home, Courses, Search, Chat, Settings
Active nav item has bold text and green dot indicator
Clicking each nav item navigates to the correct page (Home, Courses, Search, Chat, Settings)
Lesson detail page has clean underline-style tabs (NOW, NEXT, AFTER)
Lesson tabs have lesson-tab class with underline indicator on active tab
Clicking each tab shows the correct content
Chat page shows 'Community' heading with online count and Live status
Chat input is pill-shaped (rounded-full class)
Chat send button is circular (rounded-full class)
Chat send message works (REST fallback when WebSocket unavailable)
Own chat messages have dark olive green bubble (chat-bubble-own class, #4a5d3a)
Chat moderation controls (hide/delete) present in DOM for admin
Settings page loads with all sections (Display Name, Change Password, Join Another Group, Zoom Integration)
Courses page loads and course cards display correctly with thumbnails
Discussion questions accordion works on lesson AFTER tab
Discussion prompts show numbered circles and expand/collapse correctly
Desktop header visible on desktop viewport with full navigation
Mobile bottom nav hidden on desktop (responsive design working)
critical_code_review_comments: Design overhaul successfully implemented with consistent styling across all pages
Glassmorphic login card uses inline styles for backdrop-filter which works correctly
Bottom nav floating pill has proper blur effect and shadow
Lesson tabs use clean underline style instead of chunky colored pills
Chat bubbles have proper iMessage-like differentiation (own=dark olive, other=light sage)
All data-testid attributes preserved from previous implementations
Typography uses Fraunces for headings and Manrope for body text
seed_data_creation: Created test chat message during testing: 'Design test - 1775513219419'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design overhaul fully tested. Key CSS classes: glass (glassmorphism), bottom-nav-float (floating pill nav), lesson-tab/lesson-tab-active (underline tabs), chat-bubble-own/chat-bubble-other (chat styling), card-organic (card styling), btn-primary (button styling), animate-fade-in/animate-slide-up (animations). Login background image from Unsplash. WebSocket chat falls back to REST polling when connection fails. All pages responsive with desktop header and mobile bottom nav.

bottom_navigation.active_indicator: Bold text + green dot below icon

lesson_tabs.style: Underline instead of chunky colored pills

dashboard.welcome: Greeting based on time + user first name
dashboard.hero_card: Gradient background with lesson info and progress
dashboard.stats_grid: Bento layout with streak, lessons, enrolled
